params.description: Both Monday and Tuesday bars pulse to emphasize both are needed.

steps.text: Let's think about this together. We need both days. What do Monday and Tuesday add up to?

incorrects.description: Student selected 40: only counted Monday, missed Tuesday

params.description: Both Monday and Tuesday bars pulse to emphasize both are needed.

steps.text: Here's a hint: the question asks for total minutes. You need to add Monday and Tuesday together.

incorrects.description: Student selected 85: likely added all four days or miscalculated

params.description: Only Monday and Tuesday bars highlighted, other bars dim.

steps.text: You're working on it. The key is to use only Monday and Tuesday, not all the days.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Monday bar shows 40, then Tuesday bar shows 35, then both values combine to show 75.

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. Monday is 40 minutes. Tuesday is 35 minutes. When we add them, 40 plus 35 equals 75 minutes total.
